titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of BL Add. Ch. 76699

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=672 status=live modified=2021-04-05 08:44:27.209917+00 | translation moa=673 status=live modified=2021-04-05 08:44:23.549325+00

p.cl:
Omnibus Sancte matris Ecclesie filiis presens scriptum inspecturis Rogerus dei gratia Ecclesie Sancti Andree
Humilis minister Salutem in Domino .

Nos dedisse et concessisse et presenti
Carta confirmasse Willelmo filio Ade de Neuihn ad presentationem eiusdem . A . Ecclesiam de lure cum
omnibus iustis pertinentiis suis in liberam puram et perpetuam Elemosinam . Quare uolumus et firmiter
precipimus ut idem . W . prenominatam Ecclesiam libere . Quiete et Honorifice teneat et possideat . Sicut
aliqua persona Ecclesiam suam liberius . Quiecius et honorificencius in Diocesi nostra tenet et possidet .
Saluis Episcopalibus .

Testibus . Henrico abbate de Aberbruth’ . Thoma priore de Sancto Andrea .
Archenbaldo abbate de Scon’ . Hugone priore de Rostinoh’t . Magistro Ranulfo officiali . Magistro ysaac
Magistro Willelmo de Lina . Ricardo et Ricardo Capellanis . Iohanne de Lond’ . Ricardo Macro . Willelmo de Wiuilla .
Iohanne de Bereford’ . Hugone Senescaldo . Ranulfo Sacerdote de Glamnes . Baldewino Scotto .
Iohanne decano de Anegus . Simone decano de Perht . Iohanne decano de Kingor et pluribus aliis .
To all Holy Mother Church's sons intending to examine the present writing, Roger, by the grace of God a humble servant of the church of St Andrew, [sends] greeting in the Lord.

to have given and granted and by the present charter to have made firm to William son of Adam of Nevay, at the presentation of the same Adam, the church of [Meathie] Lour with all its just pertinents in free, pure, and perpetual alms. Wherefore I will and firmly instruct that the same William hold and possess the aforenamed church freely, quitly, and honourably, just as any parson most freely, quitly, and honourably holds and possesses his church in our diocese. Reserving episcopal rights.

As witnesses: Henry, abbot of Arbroath; Thomas, prior of St Andrews; Archibald, abbot of Scone; Hugh, prior of Restenneth; Master Ranulf, official; Master Isaac; Master William of Lyne; Richard and Richard, chaplains; John of London; Richard le Megre; William Wyville; John of Bearford; Hugh the steward; Ralph, priest of Glamis; Baldwin the Scot; John, dean of Angus; Simon, dean of Perth; John, dean of Kinghorn; and a great many others.
